1a81940f-c8c4-4377-86f8-f8e07c0ca5e1.label: text_chunk
1a81940f-c8c4-4377-86f8-f8e07c0ca5e1.text:
University of Arkansas at Little Rock STANDARD NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

This Agreement is effective (____/_____/______) between ___________________ (hereinafter “Recipient”) with its principal place of business at this address __________________________________________ and the Board of Trustees of the University of Arkansas acting for and on behalf of the University of Arkansas at Little Rock (hereinafter “University”), a not-for-profit educational institution formed under the laws of the State of Arkansas,

2acd63a5-eed1-419e-8387-4e47ec6502cf.label: text_chunk
2acd63a5-eed1-419e-8387-4e47ec6502cf.text:
with offices at _2801 S. University Ave, Little Rock AR, 72204.

The parties agree as follows:

Article

1. Confidential Information is defined as any information, whether written or verbal,

 of either party hereto,

a2cfdb6f-1e66-4a2a-b7ee-a911112966c1.label: text_chunk
a2cfdb6f-1e66-4a2a-b7ee-a911112966c1.text: (Disclosing Party) which is disclosed to or observed by the other party (Receiving Party) in connection with or as a result of the evaluation of any possible transaction between the University of Arkansas at Little Rock and ______________________________ and which is, at the time of disclosure, marked as being Confidential or Proprietary, or is reasonably identifiable as confidential, proprietary information of the Disclosing Party pertaining  to information  in the areas of (subject matter): _______________________________________________ ___________________________.

14b4181e-841f-4d9e-84e1-a6eee401c167.label: text_chunk
14b4181e-841f-4d9e-84e1-a6eee401c167.text:
Such Confidential Information may include, but is not limited to, business plans, forecasts, content, processes, projections or analysis, software, hardware, product, or system designs, specifications, documentation, code, structure, or protocols. Confidential Information that is disclosed verbally will also be included as proprietary.

2.

1b4a1676-9354-40c3-b691-6605866506bb.label: text_chunk
1b4a1676-9354-40c3-b691-6605866506bb.text:
Unless expressly authorized in writing by the Disclosing Party,

 the Receiving Party agrees to retain the Confidential Information in confidence and shall not copy or disclose the Confidential Information to or use the Confidential Information for the benefit of any third party. Confidential Information shall only be disclosed to the Receiving Party’s employees and, even then, only to the extent that such employees have a specific need to know of the Confidential information, for the evaluation of the proposed transaction.

08c6ee55-71fa-45f1-8e56-0c0dd3ea4d4e.label: text_chunk
08c6ee55-71fa-45f1-8e56-0c0dd3ea4d4e.text:
Before receiving any part of the Confidential Information, Receiving Party’s employees shall be required to read this Non-disclosure Agreement and, by receiving such Confidential Information, such employee shall acknowledge and agree to abide by the Receiving Party’s obligations hereunder.

3. Notwithstanding any other provisions of the Agreement,

 each party acknowledges that Confidential Information shall not include any information which:

a. was known to the Receiving Party prior to the disclosure hereunder;

b.

2fd00743-bd29-405d-a724-370d02b93da8.label: text_chunk

e00b229c-5fd8-4ed4-81bc-600d7418ce70.label: text_chunk
e00b229c-5fd8-4ed4-81bc-600d7418ce70.text:
is required to be disclosed by law,

 provided however that the Receiving Party shall give immediate notice of any such request for disclosure and cooperate with the Disclosing Party in its efforts to obtain a protective order or other protection from the requirement or consequences of disclosure.

4.  Either party will be relieved of its obligation hereunder it,

 and to the extent, that Confidential Information is explicitly approved for release by written authorization of the Disclosing Party.

5.

598c3d98-25fc-45cf-9f00-f45a0f696d64.label: text_chunk
598c3d98-25fc-45cf-9f00-f45a0f696d64.text:
Each party shall agree upon the request of the Disclosing Party to return to the Disclosing Party all Confidential Information and supporting documentation provided to the Receiving Party. One copy of such documentation shall be retained by Receiving Party for archival/legal purposes.

6.  No license, express or implied,

 in the Confidential Information is granted to either party other than to use the information in the manner and to the extent authorized by this Agreement.

d81fdd93-5a53-48bf-8bee-d39980735626.label: text_chunk
d81fdd93-5a53-48bf-8bee-d39980735626.text:
Each Party shall retain the title and full ownership rights to their respective “Confidential Information”.

7.  This Agreement shall be governed, construed,

 and interpreted by the laws of the State of Arkansas without reference to its choice of laws principles.

8.

6fcf24b4-3376-47b4-b709-08daaa36083f.label: text_chunk
6fcf24b4-3376-47b4-b709-08daaa36083f.text: This Non-disclosure Agreement is effective on the date specified in the Caption of the Agreement and will remain in effect for a period of five (5) years.IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties have caused this Agreement to be executed by their duly authorized representatives.Recipient University of Arkansas at Little Rock Name: _____________________________ Name: _____________________________ Title: _______________________________ Title: ______________________________ Date:_______________________________ Date: ______________________________

community_summary.0: The Board of Trustees governs the University of Arkansas at Little Rock, playing a crucial role in making decisions that impact the university's operations and policies. This relationship underscores the Board's authority and responsibility in overseeing the institution's governance.
community_summary.1:
The relationships outlined in the knowledge graph highlight the geographical connections between entities in Little Rock, Arkansas. 

1. **Little Rock and Arkansas**: Little Rock is a city located within the state of Arkansas, emphasizing its status as a significant urban center in the region.

2. **2801 S. University Ave and Little Rock**: The address 2801 S. University Ave is identified as a specific location within Little Rock, further detailing the city's urban landscape.

Overall, these relationships illustrate the hierarchical structure of location, with Little Rock being a key city in Arkansas and specific addresses like 2801 S. University Ave pinpointing locations within that city.
community_summary.2:
The University of Arkansas at Little Rock is involved in significant relationships concerning the sharing of confidential information and legal agreements. 

1. **Disclosing Party**: The University of Arkansas at Little Rock may act as the Disclosing Party when it shares confidential or proprietary information during evaluations of potential transactions. This highlights its role in managing sensitive information.

2. **Non-disclosure Agreement**: The University is also a party to a Non-disclosure Agreement, where it is identified as a recipient. This indicates its involvement in formal agreements to protect confidential information, underscoring its commitment to confidentiality in transactions.

Overall, these relationships emphasize the University of Arkansas at Little Rock's active role in safeguarding proprietary information and its participation in legal frameworks that govern such disclosures.
community_summary.3:
The relationships between the Disclosing Party and the Receiving Party revolve around the sharing and management of confidential information, primarily in the context of evaluating potential transactions. 

1. **Information Sharing**: The Disclosing Party shares confidential or proprietary information with the Receiving Party to facilitate the evaluation of a possible transaction. This sharing is crucial for informed decision-making.

2. **Provision of Confidential Information**: Under a confidentiality agreement, the Disclosing Party provides Confidential Information to the Receiving Party, ensuring that sensitive data is protected during the evaluation process.

3. **Authorization**: The Disclosing Party holds the authority to approve the release of Confidential Information, which directly impacts the obligations and responsibilities of the Receiving Party regarding the handling of such information.

Overall, these relationships highlight the importance of confidentiality and the structured exchange of information between the two parties, emphasizing the Disclosing Party's role in controlling and safeguarding sensitive data.
community_summary.4:
The relationships outlined involve the "Receiving Party" and the "Disclosing Party" in the context of handling Confidential Information. 

1. **Receiving Party and Confidential Information**: The Receiving Party receives Confidential Information from the Disclosing Party and is obligated to maintain its confidentiality. This relationship emphasizes the trust placed in the Receiving Party to protect sensitive information.

2. **Non-disclosure Agreement**: The Receiving Party is bound by a Non-disclosure Agreement (NDA), which sets forth the rules and responsibilities regarding the handling of Confidential Information. This legal framework is crucial for ensuring that the Receiving Party understands the implications of their obligations.

3. **Management of Confidential Information**: The Receiving Party is responsible for managing and safeguarding the Confidential Information it receives. This includes taking necessary precautions to prevent any improper disclosure, highlighting the importance of diligence in protecting sensitive data.

4. **Cooperation with Disclosing Party**: The Receiving Party is required to cooperate with the Disclosing Party in efforts to secure a protective order concerning the disclosure of Confidential Information. This aspect underscores the collaborative nature of the relationship, where both parties work together to ensure the integrity of the information shared.

In summary, the relationships illustrate a structured framework where the Receiving Party is entrusted with Confidential Information, governed by an NDA, and is responsible for its protection while also collaborating with the Disclosing Party to uphold confidentiality standards.

community_summary.20:
The relationships outlined involve a set of entities referred to as "Parties," which are engaged in a formal Agreement that governs their interactions and obligations. 

1. **Parties to Agreement**: The Parties are defined as the entities involved in the Agreement, which primarily focuses on confidentiality obligations.
   
2. **Engagement of Professional Advisors**: The Parties have agreed to disclose Confidential Information to professional advisors, indicating that these advisors are engaged to assist the Parties in fulfilling their responsibilities under the Agreement.

3. **Involvement in Agreement**: The Parties are actively involved in the Agreement, necessitating their cooperation to execute its terms and conditions effectively.

4. **Obligations and Responsibilities**: The Parties are bound by the Agreement, which clearly outlines their obligations and responsibilities towards one another.

5. **Dispute Resolution**: The Parties are required to meet to collaboratively resolve any disputes that may arise from the Agreement, emphasizing their commitment to amicable conflict resolution.

6. **Jurisdiction**: The Parties have consented to the jurisdiction of the North Gauteng Provincial Division of the High Court of the Republic of South Africa for any disputes stemming from the Agreement.

In summary, the Parties are interconnected through a formal Agreement that establishes their obligations, facilitates the engagement of professional advisors, mandates cooperation, and outlines procedures for dispute resolution, all under the jurisdiction of a specified court.

community_summary.22:
The relationships summarized below highlight the key aspects of an Agreement and its implications for the involved Parties and the Client Brand:

1. **Agreement Composition**: The Agreement is structured with various **Clauses** that detail specific terms and conditions, establishing a comprehensive legal framework.

2. **Rights and Obligations**: The Agreement confers specific **rights and obligations** on the **Party**, ensuring accountability and defining the legal responsibilities within the relationship.

3. **Definitions**: It includes definitions for relevant **Acronyms**, clarifying terminology used throughout the document.

4. **Legislative Reference**: The Agreement references the **Electronic Communications and Transactions Act**, indicating that communications required to be in writing can be sent electronically, thus relying on this legislation for validity.

5. **Commencement**: The **Signature Date** signifies the commencement of the Agreement's terms, marking when the obligations and rights become effective.

6. **Enforceability**: The Agreement is enforceable against the **Party**, meaning that the Party is legally bound to adhere to its terms.

7. **Client Brand Benefits**: Provisions within the Agreement are designed to benefit the **Client Brand**, allowing it to accept these terms as a third party.

8. **Governance**: The Agreement governs the actions and responsibilities of the **Parties**, establishing a framework for their interactions and obligations.

9. **Execution**: The Agreement is formally **signed by the Parties**, indicating their consent and commitment to the terms outlined.

Overall, the Agreement serves as a foundational document that delineates the rights, responsibilities, and legal frameworks governing the interactions between the Parties and the Client Brand, ensuring clarity and enforceability in their relationship.
community_summary.23: The relationship between "Governs" and "APPLICABLE LAW AND JURISDICTION" is centered on the resolution of "DISPUTES." The applicable law and jurisdiction clause establishes the legal framework that dictates how any disagreements will be addressed, ensuring clarity and structure in the dispute resolution process. This relationship underscores the importance of having a defined legal context for resolving conflicts.
community_summary.24:
The relationships outlined in the knowledge graph highlight key aspects of contractual agreements and their implications:

1. **Warranties by Parties and Breach**: The warranties made by parties are crucial as they define the expectations and guarantees within a contract. A breach occurs when these warranties are violated, establishing a direct link between the warranties and breaches of contract.

2. **Signature Date and Client**: The 'Signature Date' is significant for the 'Client' as it signifies the formal acceptance of the agreement. This date marks the commencement of the Client's obligations under the contract, emphasizing its importance in the contractual timeline.

In summary, the relationships illustrate how warranties set the foundation for contractual obligations and breaches, while the Signature Date serves as a pivotal moment for the Client's responsibilities within the agreement.
community_summary.25:
The relationships outlined involve a Party and its interactions with an Agreement and Domicilium.

2. **Party and Domicilium**: Each Party has a Domicilium, which serves as the designated location for receiving legal notices and communications. This emphasizes the importance of having a clear and recognized address for legal correspondence.

3. **Notification Requirement**: There is a mutual obligation for Parties to notify each other of any changes to their Domicilium. This requirement underscores the necessity for effective communication between Parties regarding their legal addresses, ensuring that all notices are properly received.

Overall, the relationships highlight the legal framework within which Parties operate, emphasizing their obligations under the Agreement and the importance of maintaining updated communication channels through their Domicilium.

community_summary.27:
The relationships outlined involve a Disclosing Party, Receiving Party, and AfriGIS, focusing on the handling of confidential information. 

1. **Disclosing Party and AfriGIS**: AfriGIS may act as a disclosing party in legal agreements, sharing confidential information.

2. **Disclosing Party and Receiving Party**: The Disclosing Party has a direct relationship with the Receiving Party, where it discloses and provides confidential information. This information is recognized as proprietary by the Receiving Party.

3. **Confidentiality Obligations**: The Receiving Party is required to destroy the confidential information upon request from the Disclosing Party, emphasizing the importance of safeguarding sensitive data.

4. **Third-Party Disclosure**: The Disclosing Party can share information with a third party only after obtaining prior written authorization, ensuring control over the dissemination of confidential information.

Overall, these relationships highlight the responsibilities and protocols surrounding the sharing of confidential information, underscoring the importance of legal agreements and the protection of proprietary data.
